description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with clean lines and a predominantly white exterior. The structure is two stories tall, with a flat roof and a prominent gable section on both ends. Large rectangular windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. A cantilevered balcony extends from one side, while an exterior staircase leads up to the main entrance, which is sheltered by a small overhang. The house sits on a green lawn with a paved walkway leading to the entry, and the overall aesthetic is minimalist and contemporary.
description: A modern, two-story white house with flat and gable roofs, asymmetrical windows, a cantilevered balcony, and an exterior staircase leading to a sheltered entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry with exterior stairs, a small overhang, and a cantilevered balcony on the left.
description_view_1: Side gable view with minimal window openings and the staircase visible on the left edge.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the cantilevered balcony and asymmetrical window arrangement, with no visible entryway.
description_view_3: Opposite gable end with more windows and the paved walkway leading up to the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with exterior stairs, small overhang, and minimalist door design
